overview: Answer 10 multiple-choice trivia questions. The faster you answer correctly, the more points you earn!

phases.name: Question
phases.desc: Read the question and pick one of 4 answers before time runs out (15 seconds).

phases.name: Reveal
phases.desc: The correct answer is revealed. Correct answers earn 100-200 points based on speed.

phases.name: Final Scores
phases.desc: After 10 questions, the player with the most points wins.

winConditions: Score the most total points across all 10 questions.
tips: Speed matters! Answering quickly earns up to double the base points.
Even if you're unsure, always guess — you might get lucky.
Watch the scoreboard to track your position against opponents.
